violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment does not have a 3-bay sink. Establishment is to use all disposable cups/utensils until chlorine concentration of sanitizing solution reaches the proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Establishment is lacking 3-bay sink at the bar. Establishment is to install 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
